metadata.title: 9 to 5
metadata.lyrics:
[00:11.05] Tumble outta bed
[00:11.72] And I stumble to the kitchen
[00:13.42] Pour myself a cup of ambition
[00:15.52] And yawn and stretch and try to come to life
[00:20.39] Jump in the shower
[00:21.47] And the blood starts pumpin'
[00:23.06] Out on the streets
[00:23.84] The traffic starts jumpin'
[00:24.92] With folks like me on the job from 9 to 5
[00:29.45] Working 9 to 5
[00:31.81] What a way to make a livin'
[00:34.28] Barely gettin' by
[00:36.66] It's all takin' and no givin'
[00:38.88] They just use your mind
[00:40.84] And they never give you credit
[00:43.29] It's enough to drive you
[00:46.02] Crazy if you let it
[00:48.45] 9 to 5, for service and devotion
[00:52.37] You would think that I
[00:54.72] Would deserve a fair promotion
[00:56.96] Want to move ahead
[00:59.16] But the boss won't seem to let me
[01:01.83] I swear sometimes that man is out to get me
[01:07.18] Mmm
[01:10.94] They let you dream
[01:12.20] Just a' watch 'em shatter
[01:13.52] You're just a step
[01:14.45] On the boss man's ladder
[01:15.69] But you got dreams he'll never take away
[01:20.75] In the same boat
[01:21.73] With a lot of your friends
[01:23.13] Waitin' for the day
[01:23.99] Your ship'll come in
[01:25.15] And the tide's gonna turn
[01:26.56] And it's all gonna roll you away
[01:29.57] Workin' 9 to 5
[01:31.52] What a way to make a livin'
[01:34.11] Barely gettin' by
[01:36.52] It's all takin' and no givin'
[01:38.75] They just use your mind
[01:41.16] And you never get the credit
[01:43.23] It's enough to drive you
[01:46.03] Crazy if you let it
[01:48.13] 9 to 5, yeah, yes, they got you where they want you
[01:52.22] There's a better life
[01:54.57] And you think about it, don't you?
[01:56.83] It's a rich man's game
[01:59.23] No matter what they call it
[02:01.23] And you spend your life
[02:03.19] Putting money in his wallet
[02:06.25] 9 to 5
[02:07.99] What a way to make a livin'
[02:10.25] Barely gettin' by
[02:12.40] It's all takin' and no givin'
[02:14.77] They just use your mind
[02:16.99] And they never give you credit
[02:18.88] It's enough to drive you
[02:21.80] Crazy if you let it
[02:24.24] 9 to 5, yeah, they got you where they want you
[02:28.18] There's a better life
[02:30.26] And you think about it, don't you?
[02:32.66] It's a rich man's game
[02:35.11] No matter what they call it
[02:37.24] And you spend your life
[02:39.42] Puttin' money in his wallet
